title: Customer Purchase Behavior Analysis
subtitle: Exploratory Data Analysis & Churn Prediction
shortDesc: Performed end-to-end exploratory data analysis on 100k+ customer transactions to identify purchasing habits and churn risks.
features: RFM segmentation, cohort analysis, and churn rate estimation
Produced 15+ interactive visualizations and correlation heatmaps

title: Sales Performance Dashboard
subtitle: E-Commerce Regional Insights
shortDesc: Built an interactive Power BI dashboard tracking revenue, profit margins, and regional sales performance across multiple business units.
features: Designed dynamic DAX measures for YoY growth and target vs. actual KPIs
Configured interactive slicers, drill-through reports, and filters
Enabled self-service analytics reporting for non-technical stakeholders

title: E-Commerce Sales Analysis
subtitle: SQL Database Query Analytics
shortDesc: Analyzed transactional databases using advanced SQL queries to uncover product demand and seasonal customer behaviors.
features: Wrote complex CTEs and window functions to extract top products
Analyzed customer metrics: repeat purchase rates and average basket sizes
Delivered strategic inventory recommendations based on seasonal demand cycles
